title: Amtech S5518 Window Squeegee, Glass Wiper for Home and Car, Comfortable Grip Handle (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
HOME & CAR USE - The Amtech S5518 window cleaning squeegee is ideal to use on both home and car windows during any time of the year.
HIGH QUALITY BLADE – The high-quality silicone blade offers a handy 30cm width for good all-round coverage, even when used as a bathroom squeegee or shower squeegee.
ERGONOMIC GRIP - This essential piece of window cleaning kit also benefits from a superior and comfortable grip handle, which takes some of the fatigue out of everyday use.
BUSINESS USE - It is also suitable to use as window cleaning equipment for hotels, offices, salons and restaurants, as well as for home cleaning.
